section.heading: Hunting, pursuing, capturing in Tahquitz National Game Preserve unlawful

content.p: On lands within the game preserve established in section 689a of this title, hunting, pursuing, poisoning, killing, or capturing by trapping, netting, or any other means, or attempting to hunt, pursue, kill, or capture any wild animals or birds for any purpose whatever upon the lands of the United States within the limits of said game preserve shall be unlawful except as hereinafter provided.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1948—Act June 25, 1948, struck out penal provisions. See section 41 of Title 18, Crimes and Criminal Procedure.

note.heading: Effective Date of 1948 Amendment
note.p: Section 20 of act June 25, 1948, provided that the amendment made by that act is effective Sept. 1, 1948.
